title: pecluma atra
intro: Pecluma atra, a type of fern native to Mexico and Central America, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pecluma atra is often used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat skin conditions and digestive issues.
